Package gq.bxteam.ndailyrewards.gui

Class GUI

java.lang.Object
gq.bxteam.ndailyrewards.AbstractListener<NDailyRewards>
gq.bxteam.ndailyrewards.gui.GUI
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener, org.bukkit.inventory.InventoryHolder
Direct Known Subclasses:
Pageable, RewardGUI
public abstract class GUI extends AbstractListener<NDailyRewards> implements org.bukkit.inventory.InventoryHolder
